title: The 8 Most Profitable U.S. Companies Practically Print Money
text: Imagine companies three times as profitable as the S&P 500 — putting them in a good position to handle whatever comes next. The post The 8 Most Profitable U.S. Companies Practically Print Money appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: CTBC Investments Selects ICE FactSet Selected Financials and Data Industry Index for New ETF
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ICE today announced that CTBC Investments has selected the ICE FactSet® Selected Financials and Data Industry Index for its newly launched ETF.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Intercontinental (ICE) Stock Now
text: A compelling portfolio, expansive risk-management services, strategic buyouts, a solid balance sheet and effective capital deployment continue to drive Intercontinental (ICE).

title: 5 Securities and Exchanges to Gain From Increased Volatility
text: Product innovation, increased market volatility and a strategic economic market model are expected to aid Securities and Exchanges stocks like ICE, CME, CBOE, NDAQ and MKTX. However, compliance with regulations remains a challenge.

title: This Company Profited $2.6 Billion From Crypto. What Is It Investing in Now?
text: Intercontinental Exchange made some whopper profits from crypto investments. Its recent investment in Black Knight could completely transform the company.

title: Truv announces integration with the leading digital lending software ICE Mortgage Technology™
text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #buildtruv--Mortgage lenders can now verify income and employment for the U.S. workforce through Truv's integration with ICE Mortgage Technology.

title: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Q2 results reflect persistent revenue growth, driven by strong Exchanges and Fixed Income and Data Services and benefits of the strength of technology and data services.

title: Intercontinental Exchange Reports Strong Second Quarter 2022
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--  2Q22 net revenues of $1.8 billion, +6% y/y   2Q22 GAAP diluted EPS of $0.99, down 55% y/y, primarily due to the 2Q21 pre-tax gain of $1.23 billion related to the full divestment of our stake in Coinbase   2Q22 adj. diluted EPS of $1.32, +14% y/y   2Q22 operating income of $869 million, +9% y/y; adj. operating income of $1.1 billion, +12% y/y   2Q22 operating margin of 48%; adj. operating margin of 59%     Jeffrey C. Sprecher,ICE Chair & Chief Executive

title: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Gears Up to Post Q2 Earnings
text: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Q2 likely to reflect solid performance at Exchanges, Fixed Income and Data Services, and Mortgage Technology segments.
